creator: dryice@dryice.name
text:
A ttached is the shar file for www/py-pastescript. A pluggable
	command-line frontend tool. It will be used in the (coming)
	TurboGears-devel port.

	Please note this PR depends on ports/106753 and ports/106755

Fix: --- attached file begins here ---


--- attached file ends here -----f40pnOPaUEJi1BTQ3H61uXFi6MBdSsfQZ9YrFoGIBNc7MvN3
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/
#	/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/distinfo
#	/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-plist
#
echo c - /usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/distinfo'
XMD5 (PasteScript-1.0.tar.gz) = 5ea4a56bc757685aaadddafbe0d64244
XSHA256 (PasteScript-1.0.tar.gz) = df88cfc18853a09dec6ed57d19c61d8b67a29d4bc7494eabe3f00ad1beb2af46
XSIZE (PasteScript-1.0.tar.gz) = 80048
END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/distinfo
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	py-pastescript
X# Date created:		15 December 2006
X# Whom:			Dryice Liu	<dryice@dryice.name>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	PasteScript
XPORTVERSION=	1.0
XCATEGORIES=	www python
XMASTER_SITES=	http://cheeseshop.python.org/packages/source/P/PasteScript/ \
X		http://dryice.name/computer/FreeBSD/distfiles/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
X
XMAINTAINER=	dryice@dryice.name
XCOMMENT=	A pluggable command-line frontend
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	easy_install:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-setuptools \
X		cheetah:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-cheetah \
X		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/PasteDeploy-1.0-py${_PYTHON_VERSION}.egg:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-pastedeploy \
X		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/Paste-1.0-py${_PYTHON_VERSION}.egg:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-paste \
X		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/twisted/plugins/twisted_web2.py:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-twistedWeb2 \
X		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/wsgiutils/SessionClient.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-wsgiutils
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XUSE_PYTHON=	2.3+
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
XPASTESCRIPTVER?=	${PORTVERSION}
XPYTHONVER?=	${_PYTHON_VERSION}
XPLIST_SUB=	PASTESCRIPTVER=${PASTESCRIPTVER} \
X		PYTHONVER=${PYTHONVER}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/Makefile
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-descr'
XA pluggable command-line frontend, including commands to setup package
Xfile layouts.
X
XThis is a pluggable command-line tool.
X
XIt includes some built-in features;
X
X* Create file layouts for packages. For instance, paste create
X  --template=basic_package MyPackage will create a setuptools-ready
X  file layout.
X
X* Serving up web applications, with configuration based on
X  paste.deploy.
X
XAuthor:	Ian Bicking <ianb at colorstudy com>
XWWW:	http://pythonpaste.org/script/
END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-pastescript/pkg-plist'
